title: Ten East Texas school districts put bond measures before voters
summary: East Texas voters are being asked to decide school and college bond proposals covering construction, CTE facilities, safety upgrades, buses, stadium projects, technology, and campus repairs.
content:
KETK, republished by AOL, listed ten East Texas school districts or education entities with May 2 bond measures, including proposals tied to school construction, career and technical education, safety, buses, stadiums, technology, and campus repairs.

RepWatchr is tracking this as a school-board and money story because school bonds connect trustees, district administrators, tax impact, facility contractors, voter turnout, campaign messaging, and public meeting records.

The next buildout step is to link each bond back to the district profile, trustee roster, election order, ballot language, campaign finance records, public meeting votes, and post-election spending tracker.
author: RepWatchr Staff
